---
title: ""
---

- Data Analysis 

    - Prediction of sales - [Rohlik project](notebooks/rohlik_sales_prediction.html)
    - House price prediction - [Prices](notebooks/house_price_prediction.html)
    - A bit of theory of statistics - [Applied statistics – Problems](notebooks/problems.html)
    - Analysis of classical Iris dataset - [Iris analysis](notebooks/iris_analysis.html)
    - Analyses of penguins dataset - [Penguins](notebooks/penguins.html)     

-  Inventory Management App - Simple web-based inventory management application built with Python\
    [luciamacakova.pythonanywhere.com](https://luciamacakova.pythonanywhere.com)

- Automated data colection pipeline - [weather_data_pipeline](weather_data_pipeline.html)
